programmes.show_name: The World Is Full of Married Men
programmes.show_description: David Cooper works in advertising but spends more time on his extra-marital love life. When his wife discovers his affairs, she decides to get her revenge. Contains nudity.
11/12. Jenni's alpacas get their annual short back and sides, the MacDonald's cattle make an epic journey across a tidal sandbar, while Nikki and Ollie down tools for Gala Day.
12/12. The Barclays boys hope to win a trophy at the Royal Highland Show. Rachel and Camy put their hopes in lamb patch. Nikki and Ollie open doors to the public. Last in series.
Jazzy Whipps is the UK's biggest deaf influencer - but success brings trolling. It takes courage and resilience to be Jazzy. Funded and supported by Together TV and BSLBT.

15/43. Charlie and Lee are in Andover to create a relaxing garden that suits the whole family, including the children and the couple's dog, Tyson.
4/35. Charlie and Flo go head-to-head to create a Jamaican-inspired garden for Norline and Wendell to relax and socialise in.
Ronnie Barker stars as General Futtock, who has a motley group of guests stay at his country estate - and chaos ensues. Contains 70s social attitudes.
Comedy. A despondent man hires a professional assassin to take himself out. Stars David Jason and Monty Python's Graham Chapman.
In 1944 France, a group of escaped American military prisoners volunteer to steal a German V2 rocket warhead for the Allies. Wartime action starring Bo Svenson.
In 1939 an English hunter takes aim at Hitler with a rifle. He is then captured, tortured and left for dead. He escapes but his captors pursue him to England. Peter O'Toole stars.

5/35. Charlie and Flo will have their work cut out if they are to turn a blank canvas into a magical haven of family fun and wildlife discovery.
The misadventures of four female au pairs, who arrive at Heathrow Airport and are whisked off to work for different families. Contains sexual scenes and 70s social attitudes.
An apparently respectable middle-class housewife controls a select group of attractive women who moonlight as hired assassins. Rula Lenska stars. Contains nudity.

Interviews with 19 men and women who were part of the Battle of Britain - unique accounts of the parts they played in the nation's defence, in their own words.
Solomon Watkins' quirky take as he interviews Michael, owner of the world's most unique collection of Really Thick Glasses. Funded and supported by Together TV and Cat Flap Media.
Following a painful adoption journey which comes to an abrupt halt, Hollyoaks star Ross Adams explores what can be done to make the system easier for LGBTQ+ adopters.

Tom Gaisford's film follows a gay trans man stepping into the ring for a boxing fight. This knockout documentary gives you a ringside seat to a situation gaining notoriety.

programmes.show_name: How To Have A Better Orgasm
programmes.show_description: Made by women for women, this film reveals proven orgasm-encouraging techniques to try at home. Featuring frank interviews with seven women about their sex lives.
